GUARD.notes: PRIORITY: #366 SEC-1 Remote Console full-stack audit (replaces cancelled #359, same scope updated for ttyd architecture). Scope: (1) JWT extraction on WS upgrade — verify bridge re-validates signature + role=admin + expiry, not just presence; (2) WS frame hardening — max message size cap, command length cap, UTF-8 validation, reject binary; (3) audit log integrity — every command row in jarvis_console_log has userId/userEmail (no nulls), command field not truncated silently, no PII leak in stderr captured; (4) command sanitization — confirm NO server-side shell injection vector (bridge spawns commands via list args, not `sh -c`); (5) rate limit correctness — 20/min keyed on user.id not IP (IP-keyed would let one admin DOS themselves via shared IP); (6) CORS + Origin check on /api/admin/jarvis POST; (7) safe-mode toggle + dangerous-command guard cannot be bypassed via direct WS frame. Deliverable: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md with findings + severity + fix proposals. THEN #330 nginx hardening (docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf) — CSP frame-src comgate.eu, rate limits, 20M cap scoped to /api/uploadthing*, X-Forwarded-* sanitization, TLS 1.2+.
